name: Friday
desc: Private control plane for AI agents

name: calfkit-sdk
desc: 🐮 Build powerful AI agents with dynamic agent-to-agent discovery and collaboration

name: jiuwenswarm
desc: JiuwenSwarm is an intelligent AI Agent built on openJiuwen. It extends the powerful capabilities of large language models directly to your fingertips through various communication apps you use daily.

name: wispterm
desc: A cross-platform terminal workspace for remote development and AI agent workflows, powered by libghostty-vt

name: cherry-studio
desc: AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs

name: aidevops
desc: Vibe-Coding is easy. DevOps is hard. OpenCode & Git token-efficient AI agent automation for your app, business, and personal development. Opinionated tools, services, CLI & API stack for speed, security, and 24/7 results. Open-source first. SOTA everything. Try on your repos for money-making magic.

name: agor
desc: Orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini sessions on a multiplayer canvas. Manage git worktrees, track AI conversations, and visualize your team's agentic work in real-time.

name: software-agent-sdk
desc: A clean, modular SDK for building AI agents with OpenHands V1.

name: OpenViking
desc: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

name: Zoo-Code
desc: Zoo Code gives you a whole dev team of AI agents in your code editor.
